master_row.title: Quantum Harmonic Oscillator (TZP-Modified)
master_row.canonical_statement: This modifies the familiar quantum harmonic oscillator to include effects of the curved manifold and the TZP; frequency and energy levels shift according to curvature.
master_row.formation_inputs: ω, δ, p, m, q, a
master_row.formation_note: Documented in the source as a commutator / bracket relation relating ω, δ, p, m, q, a.
master_row.dictionary: The TZP‑modified harmonic oscillator has Hamiltonian (H = 12m,p^2 + 12m^2(q)^2 + H), where ( H) encodes curvature‑dependent corrections and (q) is measured using the Trawin base unit; ladder operators satisfy ([a,a^]=1) but acquire curvature‑dependent phases.
master_row.encyclopedia: The TZP-modified oscillator keeps the standard oscillator core while adding a curvature-sensitive correction. Interpretive role: This model is the compact laboratory for the quantum branch of the canon. It shows how familiar quantized systems are retained while still carrying TRAWIN-specific corrections into their spectrum and operator algebra.
